title: [ACT] [ENG] BLUE GUARDIAN: Margaret (FoxEye)
description:
[![https://iceimg.net/data_server_2/1069/small/small_Margaret1.jpg](https://iceimg.net/data_server_2/1069/small/small_Margaret1.jpg)](https://iceimg.net/xruvxdeu) [![https://iceimg.net/data_server_1/1069/small/small_Margaret2.jpg](https://iceimg.net/data_server_1/1069/small/small_Margaret2.jpg)](https://iceimg.net/tnkea3) [![https://iceimg.net/data_server_2/1069/small/small_Margaret3.jpg](https://iceimg.net/data_server_2/1069/small/small_Margaret3.jpg)](https://iceimg.net/4ogi7jsfn) [![https://iceimg.net/data_server_1/1069/small/small_Margaret4.jpg](https://iceimg.net/data_server_1/1069/small/small_Margaret4.jpg)](https://iceimg.net/v7pkqd) 

FoxEye presents the 2D Underwater Action adventure of Margaret, Guardian of the Tower of the Water Deity.

* The wait is over! BLUE GUARDIAN: Margaret is fully localized into English thanks to the translation assistance of TPLS.
Now you can experience the Japanese game, without regional concerns, around the world on any Windows OS system!
Please enjoy the adventure to your heart's content!

* Smooth underwater swimming, tight responsive action, speedy gun shooting.
Obtain new abilities as you explore the open sea, fire magic bullets to discover hidden paths and items,
and strengthen Margaret as you go. Created in the time-honored tradition of explorer action games,
there are 3 difficulty settings to match the preference of any player.
Set in the flooded sea-tower of a water god, BLUE GUARDIAN is the beautiful, sometimes gruesome,
modestly sexy portrayal of a girl who uses no gear: a natural underwater diver.

* "Margaret" received heavenly orders to protect the "Tower of the Water Deity" as its Guardian.
But she's an easygoing girl. Guardians are usually strong because they're masters of a variety of magic and martial arts.
Margaret, however, is poor at magic, so she uses two large-sized pistols that fire magical bullets.
She is full of vitality and has built up her body, but she's learned no martial arts or stuck to anything like that.
In short, she has slacked in her everyday duty as the Guardian.

Her laziness has let the Tower of the Water Deity fill with monsters and its water become polluted,
troubling the humans and angering the gods.
Apollo, in charge of communication between the Guardian and all gods, has ordered Margaret to
reveal the source of the pollution and wipe out the monsters.

The story of Margaret begins now...

* This game depicts half-nude and full-nude drownings, as well as water-related torture that make the game
"soft hardcore", but rest easy that there are no grotesque depictions like blood or broken bodies.
I hope your understanding the design and furthermore that you will purchase and enjoy the game.

In a far-distant galaxy.

Two of the biggest forces, the Republic of Naba and the Imperial Nation of Dagoo,
have long been in a cold war state after two large-scale wars.

For the sake of the peace, the government of Naba sends out a spy group
named Diva, to Dagoo. The peace, despite the fact that only the surface
of the two nations' relationship can only be said peaceful, has been kept by Diva.

Diva consists of specially trained women. Their achievements in espionage activities,
physical combats and assassinations are largely attributed to techniques in sexual services.

When one of Diva agents "Noce" who is on a mission on the planet "Col Earth"
receives a contact from her old friend Lynn, this story begins.

---------------------------------------------------------

Smooth Animations created with pixel artworks and AE!
An authentic action game with stage clear & a bit of exploration taste!

Voiced by Narumi Aisaka and Rio Fujimura!
This story of a great adventure is spun with pixel artworks, CG and female characters' voices.

Once caught by an enemy, an H animation begins and the "force gauge" recovers by
making the enemy orgasm. But it also decreases health so be careful!

Urban city with skyscrapers, Ancient city beneath the surface of a snowball planet,
two agents' battle on a baking rocky planet, monstrous insects on a green planet, and...

It took about six years to make this game!
Please enjoy!!

* Please prepare a USB controller to play this game.

title: Darling / Darling Page  (ep. 1-3 of 3) [uncen] [2003, DVD5]  [Japanese, English, Spanish, Russian]
description:
![](https://i43.fastpic.ru/big/2012/0710/9e/fbaa13c21bede8ae9baaf5777dbe0a9e.jpg)

__Year of production:__ 2003
__Genre:__ Comedy, Straight, Tentacles, Group
__Series:__ ep. 1-3 of 3
__Duration:__ 3 episodes, 25 minutes each
__Censorship:__ None
__Language:__ Japanese, English, Spanish
__Subtitles:__ Russian
__Director:__ Susumu Kudo
__Studio:__ Tokyo Animation Center, Amumo


__Description:__
The plot of "Darling" is based on the fact that you meet Jun Kitano, a man who paints hentai manga (manga) and his wonderful wife Miyuki, who used to be his assistant. At the very beginning of the 1st episode, excerpts from the wedding ceremony of Joon and Miyuki are shown, and then their first wedding night ... After that, a certain Sonoco Mifuji comes to the happy married couple of the Aranami publishing house and offers her a job: draw a manga collection that covered would be a great many different genres. And focuses on the fact that it will be the cultural heritage of the 21st century! But not everything is so simple. Sonoko puts the newlyweds on condition that they have to finish the manga in 30 days, otherwise the boss threatened to dismiss her from work and make her a toy. After Joon’s stormy objections that it’s impossible to do this in such a short time, he still agrees to this work in order to help poor Sonoco. In addition, Juna has a secret technique "Hyper Erection Mode", which he reaches, not without the help of his beautiful wife. June claims that this mode is able to speed up the process of creating manga 10 times! And then there is the development of the plot. During 3 OVA episodes, the couple comes up with different scenarios for their future manga, dressing up in different outfits and putting on some kind of "scenes" in these very costumes ...
Will June and Miyuki have time to finish work on the manga in 30 days? ...

■ストーリー■
色々悪さをして天界から追放された主人公。
天界への復讐を誓う主人公がとった手段は、人間界の征服!
人間界を征服しながら力をつけ、天界へ復讐を誓うのでした。

■概要■
当サークルの前作『person of courage』と凌辱ジャンルは同じですが、
今作は『エッチイベント>ストーリー』の比重になっています。
主に輪姦・異種姦・触手シチュエーションが大半です。

■選べるシチュエーション■
攻略対象の女の子を倒すと、主に3つの選択肢から処遇を選べます。
選んだ処遇によってエッチイベントが変化し、
その後の攻略の仕方も色々模索出来ます。

初期6シナリオ(追加バージョンアップ有り)の中から、
好きなシナリオから攻略が出来ます。(一部例外あり)
また、クリアだけならシナリオを飛ばしてクリアも可能です。

■その他■
その他、当サークルとしては初の試みとなる要素を色々と入れてます。
体験版ではその内容の全てを盛り込むことは困難ですが、
是非一度、体験版をプレイしてみてください。

__Description__
 A Long time ago, a curse was cast upon the Rindo family. The curse: the family could only give birth to girls. The only way to temporarily lift the curse was to have a child with someone from the Hizuki family. Once the curse was lifted, it would haunt the family again every 3rd generation. Many years have passed and now, Naoto Rindo will be the unfortunate one. His former fiancé from the Hizuki family has passed away due to a tragic accident and now he must impregnate one of the other four girls from the Hizuki family, however, time is running short.
Will he be able to successfully impregnate one of the girls with a boy? Or will the curse ruin his life, forever...
